categories.name: Data Governance & Catalog
categories.description: Platforms for metadata management, data cataloging, policy enforcement, and governance workflows.

vendors.name: Collibra
vendors.notes: Market leader in data governance; acquired Sifflet for observability.

vendors.name: Alation
vendors.notes: Data intelligence platform; strong in data catalog and search.

vendors.name: Atlan
vendors.notes: Modern data workspace; active metadata and collaboration focus.

vendors.name: Informatica
vendors.notes: Acquired by Salesforce; IDMC platform covers governance, quality, integration.

vendors.name: data.world
vendors.notes: Cloud-native data catalog with knowledge graph approach.

vendors.name: Precisely
vendors.notes: Data integrity suite covering quality, governance, and enrichment.

categories.name: Data Observability & Quality
categories.description: Tools for monitoring data pipeline health, detecting anomalies, and ensuring data reliability at scale.

vendors.name: Monte Carlo
vendors.notes: Pioneer of data observability category; end-to-end pipeline monitoring.

vendors.name: Great Expectations
vendors.notes: Open-source data quality validation framework; GX Cloud for enterprise.

vendors.name: Soda
vendors.notes: Data quality checks as code; integrates with dbt and Airflow.

vendors.name: Bigeye
vendors.notes: Automated data quality monitoring with ML-driven anomaly detection.

vendors.name: Acceldata
vendors.notes: Data observability across compute, pipelines, and reliability.

vendors.name: Anomalo
vendors.notes: Automated data quality monitoring using unsupervised ML.

categories.name: Data Integration & Pipelines
categories.description: ETL/ELT platforms, data integration tools, and pipeline orchestration for enterprise data movement.

vendors.name: Fivetran
vendors.notes: Automated data integration; 500+ connectors for ELT.

vendors.name: dbt Labs
vendors.notes: Analytics engineering standard; SQL-based transformation layer.

vendors.name: Airbyte
vendors.notes: Open-source data integration with 350+ connectors.

vendors.name: Matillion
vendors.notes: Data productivity platform; low-code data integration and transformation.

vendors.name: Dagster
vendors.notes: Data orchestration platform; asset-based pipeline management.

vendors.name: Prefect
vendors.notes: Workflow orchestration for data pipelines; Python-native.

categories.name: AI/ML Platforms
categories.description: End-to-end platforms for building, training, deploying, and governing AI and machine learning models.

vendors.name: Databricks
vendors.notes: Lakehouse platform; Mosaic ML acquisition for foundation models.

vendors.name: Dataiku
vendors.notes: Everyday AI platform; visual ML + GenAI for enterprise teams.

vendors.name: Weights & Biases
vendors.notes: ML experiment tracking, model registry, and LLM evaluation.

vendors.name: Domino Data Lab
vendors.notes: Enterprise MLOps platform; model management and governance.

vendors.name: H2O.ai
vendors.notes: AutoML and GenAI platform; h2oGPT for enterprise LLM deployment.

vendors.name: Anthropic
vendors.notes: Claude AI; enterprise-grade LLM with constitutional AI approach.

categories.name: Cloud Data Platforms
categories.description: Cloud-native data warehouses, lakehouses, and unified analytics platforms for enterprise-scale workloads.

vendors.name: Snowflake
vendors.notes: Cloud data platform; data sharing, marketplace, and Cortex AI.

vendors.name: Microsoft Fabric
vendors.notes: Unified analytics platform on Azure; 18K+ enterprise customers.

vendors.name: Google BigQuery
vendors.notes: Serverless data warehouse; BigLake for lakehouse, Gemini integration.

vendors.name: Amazon Redshift
vendors.notes: Cloud data warehouse; serverless, ML integration via SageMaker.

vendors.name: Starburst
vendors.notes: Trino-based query engine; federated analytics across data sources.

vendors.name: Dremio
vendors.notes: Lakehouse platform; Apache Iceberg-native, sub-second BI queries.

categories.name: Data Security & Privacy
categories.description: Tools for data access governance, privacy compliance, encryption, masking, and security posture management.

vendors.name: OneTrust
vendors.notes: Privacy, security, and governance platform; GDPR/CCPA compliance.

vendors.name: BigID
vendors.notes: Data intelligence for privacy, security, and governance.

vendors.name: Immuta
vendors.notes: Data access governance; policy-based controls for cloud data.

vendors.name: Securiti
vendors.notes: Data command center; AI-driven data security and privacy.

vendors.name: Privacera
vendors.notes: Open-source data governance and access control; Apache Ranger-based.

vendors.name: Skyflow
vendors.notes: Data privacy vault; API-first approach to sensitive data isolation.
